records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Ms. Chairwoman. You're back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Ms. Chairwoman. You're back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Ms. Chairwoman. You're back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've finished your schedule for the day, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've finished your schedule for the day, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've finished your schedule for the day, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. We'll need to do a few more rounds of testing, but it ended well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. We'll need to do a few more rounds of testing, but it ended well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. We'll need to do a few more rounds of testing, but it ended well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you here on Student Council business? Why don't you take it a little easy today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you here on Student Council business? Why don't you take it a little easy today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you here on Student Council business? Why don't you take it a little easy today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, we all were waiting for you, Ms. Chairwoman!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, we all were waiting for you, Ms. Chairwoman!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, we all were waiting for you, Ms. Chairwoman!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're done with your schedule, could you come with us somewhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're done with your schedule, could you come with us somewhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're done with your schedule, could you come with us somewhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. But I still have a lot of things left to do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. But I still have a lot of things left to do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. But I still have a lot of things left to do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for all your hard work, Ms. Chairwoman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for all your hard work, Ms. Chairwoman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for all your hard work, Ms. Chairwoman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Halloween event is in full swing right now, would you like to join us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Halloween event is in full swing right now, would you like to join us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Halloween event is in full swing right now, would you like to join us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've already taken care of all the leftover paperwork, so don't worry about them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've already taken care of all the leftover paperwork, so don't worry about them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've already taken care of all the leftover paperwork, so don't worry about them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! All of you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! All of you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! All of you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My work is not something that can be resolved by you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My work is not something that can be resolved by you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My work is not something that can be resolved by you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not to worry. We didn't touch any important documents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not to worry. We didn't touch any important documents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not to worry. We didn't touch any important documents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he... In truth, we couldn't do anything about them in fear of causing trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he... In truth, we couldn't do anything about them in fear of causing trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he... In truth, we couldn't do anything about them in fear of causing trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's okay with you, would you like to join us in going to the Fluffy Cafe?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's okay with you, would you like to join us in going to the Fluffy Cafe?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's okay with you, would you like to join us in going to the Fluffy Cafe?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The children of White Rabbit seemed to have prepared one bigger than last Christmas!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The children of White Rabbit seemed to have prepared one bigger than last Christmas!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The children of White Rabbit seemed to have prepared one bigger than last Christmas!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Girls...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Girls...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Girls...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I think I can use some time off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I think I can use some time off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I think I can use some time off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great decision, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great decision, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great decision, ma'am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grrrr!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grrrr!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grrrr!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now you listen here, puppy! The President rescued you, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now you listen here, puppy! The President rescued you, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now you listen here, puppy! The President rescued you, didn't she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you not recognize the person who saved you? Sit! Paw!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you not recognize the person who saved you? Sit! Paw!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you not recognize the person who saved you? Sit! Paw!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
F-fine! Any limb is fine, so could you please
8g

F-fine! Any limb is fine, so could you please
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: RUFF!
records.m_Talk_DEU: RUFF!
records.m_Talk_FRA: RUFF!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaargh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, Alexander! You shouldn't bite people!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, Alexander! You shouldn't bite people!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, Alexander! You shouldn't bite people!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you several times. His name is not "puppy." It's Alexander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you several times. His name is not "puppy." It's Alexander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you several times. His name is not "puppy." It's Alexander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is Alexander's policy to bite any enemy that approaches him!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is Alexander's policy to bite any enemy that approaches him!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is Alexander's policy to bite any enemy that approaches him!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ack! Alex-whatever-you-are! Let go of me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ack! Alex-whatever-you-are! Let go of me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ack! Alex-whatever-you-are! Let go of me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's mad because you did a poor cosplay of the President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's mad because you did a poor cosplay of the President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's mad because you did a poor cosplay of the President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's saying, "Woof! I'm no idiot who can't even recognize my savior!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's saying, "Woof! I'm no idiot who can't even recognize my savior!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's saying, "Woof! I'm no idiot who can't even recognize my savior!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who's calling whom an idiot?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who's calling whom an idiot?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who's calling whom an idiot?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait! You shouldn't bite people there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait! You shouldn't bite people there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait! You shouldn't bite people there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There, there, Alexander. Don't do that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There, there, Alexander. Don't do that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There, there, Alexander. Don't do that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Woof!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Woof!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Woof!

records.m_Talk_ENG: P-phew...
records.m_Talk_DEU: P-phew...
records.m_Talk_FRA: P-phew...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. Alexander is such a good dog. Were you playing with Naielle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha. Alexander is such a good dog. Were you playing with Naielle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. Alexander is such a good dog. Were you playing with Naielle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How's that a good dog?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How's that a good dog?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How's that a good dog?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, what are you doing here? And what's with that outfit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, what are you doing here? And what's with that outfit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, what are you doing here? And what's with that outfit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yesterday, Naielle made a bet with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yesterday, Naielle made a bet with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yesterday, Naielle made a bet with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The loser has to wear something the winner chose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The loser has to wear something the winner chose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The loser has to wear something the winner chose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: These are Yen's clothes, and I thought Naielle would be happy to wear them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These are Yen's clothes, and I thought Naielle would be happy to wear them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These are Yen's clothes, and I thought Naielle would be happy to wear them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... I'm not happy one bit! You just had to pick the most embarrassing outfit...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... I'm not happy one bit! You just had to pick the most embarrassing outfit...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... I'm not happy one bit! You just had to pick the most embarrassing outfit...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Embarrassing...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Embarrassing...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Embarrassing...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't forget... the shame you gave me today!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't forget... the shame you gave me today!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't forget... the shame you gave me today!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure to make you wear <color=#ffd34c>something super embarrassing</color>!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure to make you wear <color=#ffd34c>something super embarrassing</color>!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure to make you wear <color=#ffd34c>something super embarrassing</color>!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall accept your challenge anytime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall accept your challenge anytime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall accept your challenge anytime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're strong and diligent, so I believe you will surpass me one day, Naielle.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're strong and diligent, so I believe you will surpass me one day, Naielle.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're strong and diligent, so I believe you will surpass me one day, Naielle.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ha ha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ha ha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ha ha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you're not laughing at me because of what I'm wearing, are you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you're not laughing at me because of what I'm wearing, are you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you're not laughing at me because of what I'm wearing, are you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought I wanted to introduce you to a close friend of mine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought I wanted to introduce you to a close friend of mine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought I wanted to introduce you to a close friend of mine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-friend...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-friend...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-friend...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't your friends all, like, CEOs of a top-class TASKFORCE?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't your friends all, like, CEOs of a top-class TASKFORCE?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't your friends all, like, CEOs of a top-class TASKFORCE?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please do! So, when can I expect to meet your friend...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please do! So, when can I expect to meet your friend...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please do! So, when can I expect to meet your friend...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Right now's not a good time... But I'll set up something later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Right now's not a good time... But I'll set up something later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Right now's not a good time... But I'll set up something later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, then why did you bring it up and get me all excited?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, then why did you bring it up and get me all excited?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, then why did you bring it up and get me all excited?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hojin, can we order? Mine and the Student Council members.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hojin, can we order? Mine and the Student Council members.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hojin, can we order? Mine and the Student Council members.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, absolutely!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, absolutely!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, absolutely!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Chairwoman. I apologize for cutting the connection without notice during the previous test.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Chairwoman. I apologize for cutting the connection without notice during the previous test.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman. I apologize for cutting the connection without notice during the previous test.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your friends asked for my understanding that they wanted to proceed with just the three of you without any interruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your friends asked for my understanding that they wanted to proceed with just the three of you without any interruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your friends asked for my understanding that they wanted to proceed with just the three of you without any interruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about it. I had a great time, thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about it. I had a great time, thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about it. I had a great time, thanks to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I felt like I was transported back in time to when I was a student.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I felt like I was transported back in time to when I was a student.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I felt like I was transported back in time to when I was a student.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I wished that it stayed like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I wished that it stayed like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I wished that it stayed like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I'm sorry for being unprofessional.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I'm sorry for being unprofessional.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I'm sorry for being unprofessional.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I can't tell who's the student and who's the adult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I can't tell who's the student and who's the adult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I can't tell who's the student and who's the adult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yen, you have potential. So much that I want to hire you as a professor once you get older.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yen, you have potential. So much that I want to hire you as a professor once you get older.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yen, you have potential. So much that I want to hire you as a professor once you get older.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's too much of a praise, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's too much of a praise, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's too much of a praise, ma'am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here are your drinks and the thirteen types of desserts you ordered!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here are your drinks and the thirteen types of desserts you ordered!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here are your drinks and the thirteen types of desserts you ordered!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I ordered them. They told me I could only have them here, and was curious how they tasted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I ordered them. They told me I could only have them here, and was curious how they tasted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I ordered them. They told me I could only have them here, and was curious how they tasted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-can you really eat all of them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-can you really eat all of them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-can you really eat all of them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not make the mistake of wasting food, so do not worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not make the mistake of wasting food, so do not worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not make the mistake of wasting food, so do not worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can take home the rest, so don't force yourself to eat them all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can take home the rest, so don't force yourself to eat them all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can take home the rest, so don't force yourself to eat them all.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, what are you doing here? And what's with that outfit?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, what are you doing here? And what's with that outfit?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yesterday, Naielle made a bet with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yesterday, Naielle made a bet with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yesterday, Naielle made a bet with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The loser has to wear something the winner chose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The loser has to wear something the winner chose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The loser has to wear something the winner chose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: These are Yen's clothes, and I thought Naielle would be happy to wear them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These are Yen's clothes, and I thought Naielle would be happy to wear them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These are Yen's clothes, and I thought Naielle would be happy to wear them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... I'm not happy one bit! You just had to pick the most embarrassing outfit...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... I'm not happy one bit! You just had to pick the most embarrassing outfit...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... I'm not happy one bit! You just had to pick the most embarrassing outfit...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Embarrassing...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Embarrassing...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Embarrassing...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't forget... the shame you gave me today!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't forget... the shame you gave me today!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't forget... the shame you gave me today!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure to make you wear <color=#ffd34c>something super embarrassing</color>!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure to make you wear <color=#ffd34c>something super embarrassing</color>!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure to make you wear <color=#ffd34c>something super embarrassing</color>!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I shall accept your challenge anytime.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I shall accept your challenge anytime.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I shall accept your challenge anytime.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're strong and diligent, so I believe you will surpass me one day, Naielle.94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're strong and diligent, so I believe you will surpass me one day, Naielle.94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're strong and diligent, so I believe you will surpass me one day, Naielle.94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ha ha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ha ha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ha ha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you're not laughing at me because of what I'm wearing, are you?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you're not laughing at me because of what I'm wearing, are you?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you're not laughing at me because of what I'm wearing, are you?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How could I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How could I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How could I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought I wanted to introduce you to a close friend of mine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought I wanted to introduce you to a close friend of mine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought I wanted to introduce you to a close friend of mine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-friend...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-friend...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-friend...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't your friends all, like, CEOs of a top-class TASKFORCE?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't your friends all, like, CEOs of a top-class TASKFORCE?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't your friends all, like, CEOs of a top-class TASKFORCE?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please do! So, when can I expect to meet your friend...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please do! So, when can I expect to meet your friend...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please do! So, when can I expect to meet your friend...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Right now's not a good time... But I'll set up something later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Right now's not a good time... But I'll set up something later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Right now's not a good time... But I'll set up something later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, then why did you bring it up and get me all excited?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, then why did you bring it up and get me all excited?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, then why did you bring it up and get me all excited?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hojin, can we order? Mine and the Student Council members.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hojin, can we order? Mine and the Student Council members.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hojin, can we order? Mine and the Student Council members.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, absolutely!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, absolutely!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, absolutely!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Chairwoman. I apologize for cutting the connection without notice during the previous test.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Chairwoman. I apologize for cutting the connection without notice during the previous test.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman. I apologize for cutting the connection without notice during the previous test.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your friends asked for my understanding that they wanted to proceed with just the three of you without any interruption.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your friends asked for my understanding that they wanted to proceed with just the three of you without any interruption.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your friends asked for my understanding that they wanted to proceed with just the three of you without any interruption.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about it. I had a great time, thanks to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about it. I had a great time, thanks to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about it. I had a great time, thanks to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I felt like I was transported back in time to when I was a student.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I felt like I was transported back in time to when I was a student.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I felt like I was transported back in time to when I was a student.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I wished that it stayed like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I wished that it stayed like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I wished that it stayed like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I'm sorry for being unprofessional.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I'm sorry for being unprofessional.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I'm sorry for being unprofessional.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I can't tell who's the student and who's the adult.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I can't tell who's the student and who's the adult.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I can't tell who's the student and who's the adult.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yen, you have potential. So much that I want to hire you as a professor once you get older.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yen, you have potential. So much that I want to hire you as a professor once you get older.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yen, you have potential. So much that I want to hire you as a professor once you get older.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's too much of a praise, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's too much of a praise, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's too much of a praise, ma'am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here are your drinks and the thirteen types of desserts you ordered!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here are your drinks and the thirteen types of desserts you ordered!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here are your drinks and the thirteen types of desserts you ordered!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I ordered them. They told me I could only have them here, and was curious how they tasted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I ordered them. They told me I could only have them here, and was curious how they tasted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I ordered them. They told me I could only have them here, and was curious how they tasted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-can you really eat all of them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-can you really eat all of them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-can you really eat all of them?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will not make the mistake of wasting food, so do not worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will not make the mistake of wasting food, so do not worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will not make the mistake of wasting food, so do not worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can take home the rest, so don't force yourself to eat them all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can take home the rest, so don't force yourself to eat them all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can take home the rest, so don't force yourself to eat them all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agh! Bad puppy! Why are you only stealing mine?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agh! Bad puppy! Why are you only stealing mine?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agh! Bad puppy! Why are you only stealing mine?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Stop right there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Stop right there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Stop right there!
